headline: Aptiv Named One of the World’s Most Ethical Companies® for the 14th Consecutive Year
summary: SCHAFFHAUSEN, Switzerland, March 18, 2026--Aptiv PLC (NYSE: APTV), a global industrial technology company, today announced it has been recognized as one of the 2026 World’s Most Ethical Companies® by Ethisphere, a global leader in defining and advancing the standards of ethical business practices.
